mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONSULTATION WHERE CNSL_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND CNSL_DT < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), 1)) AS MONTH_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONSULTATION WHERE TRIM(CNSL_STAT_CD) = '01') AS SCHEDULED_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONSULTATION WHERE TRIM(CNSL_STAT_CD) = '02') AS DONE_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONSULTATION WHERE TRIM(CNSL_STAT_CD) = '03') AS FOLLOWUP_CNT FROM DUAL
mapper.sql: C.CNSL_SN, C.STD_USER_ID, SM.USER_NAME AS STUDENT_NM, PM.USER_NAME AS PARENT_NM, C.CHRG_USER_ID, CM.USER_NAME AS CHRG_NM, C.CNSL_TYPE_CD, CT.COM_CD_NM AS CNSL_TYPE_NM, C.CNSL_STAT_CD, CS.COM_CD_NM AS CNSL_STAT_NM, C.CNSL_DT, C.CNSL_CN, C.CNSL_SMRY, C.FLLW_UP_CN

FROM CONSULTATION C JOIN STUDENT S ON C.STD_USER_ID = S.STD_USER_ID JOIN MEMBER SM ON S.STD_USER_ID = SM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER PM ON S.PRNT_USER_ID = PM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER CM ON C.CHRG_USER_ID = CM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CD CT ON TRIM(CT.CL_CODE) = '211' AND TRIM(CT.COM_CD) = TRIM(C.CNSL_TYPE_CD) LEFT JOIN COM_CD CS ON TRIM(CS.CL_CODE) = '212' AND TRIM(CS.COM_CD) = TRIM(C.CNSL_STAT_CD)

where.if: AND (UPPER(SM.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(PM.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY C.CNSL_DT DESC, C.CNSL_SN DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONSULTATION C JOIN STUDENT S ON C.STD_USER_ID = S.STD_USER_ID JOIN MEMBER SM ON S.STD_USER_ID = SM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER PM ON S.PRNT_USER_ID = PM.USER_ID

SELECT
WHERE C.CNSL_DT >= TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{start}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND C.CNSL_DT < TO_DATE(SUBSTR(#{end}, 1, 10), 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY C.CNSL_DT
mapper.sql: S.STD_USER_ID, SM.USER_NAME AS STUDENT_NM, SM.USER_TELNO AS STUDENT_TEL, S.ENRL_SCHL_NM, PM.USER_NAME AS PARENT_NM, S.PRNT_TELNO AS PARENT_TEL, (SELECT MAX(CR.CLASS_NM) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER CMB JOIN CLASSROOM CR ON CMB.CLASS_SN = CR.CLASS_SN WHERE CMB.USER_ID = S.STD_USER_ID) AS CLASS_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONSULTATION CC WHERE CC.STD_USER_ID = S.STD_USER_ID) AS CNSL_CNT

where.if: AND (UPPER(SM.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(PM.USER_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{detailCondition.keyword}) || '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM STUDENT S JOIN MEMBER SM ON S.STD_USER_ID = SM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER PM ON S.PRNT_USER_ID = PM.USER_ID
ORDER BY SM.USER_NAME OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{screenSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STUDENT S JOIN MEMBER SM ON S.STD_USER_ID = SM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER PM ON S.PRNT_USER_ID = PM.USER_ID
SELECT FROM STUDENT S JOIN MEMBER SM ON S.STD_USER_ID = SM.USER_ID LEFT JOIN MEMBER PM ON S.PRNT_USER_ID = PM.USER_ID WHERE S.STD_USER_ID = #{stdUserId}

SELECT CL.CLASS_NM AS CLASS_NM, CO.COURSE_NM AS COURSE_NM, IM.USER_NAME AS INSTR_NM FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER CM JOIN CLASSROOM CL ON CM.CLASS_SN = CL.CLASS_SN JOIN COURSE CO ON CL.COURSE_SN = CO.COURSE_SN LEFT JOIN MEMBER IM ON CO.INSTR_USER_ID = IM.USER_ID WHERE CM.USER_ID = #{stdUserId} AND TRIM(CM.ENRL_STAT_CD) IN ('ENROLLED', 'COMPLETED') ORDER BY CL.CLASS_NM
